import bpy

# Delete all objects in the scene
bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.object.delete(use_global=False)

# Create cube
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=2, location=(0, 0, 0))
cube = bpy.context.active_object

# Add material
mat = bpy.data.materials.new(name="CubeMaterial")
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes["Principled BSDF"]
bsdf.inputs[0].default_value = (0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1)  # Red color
cube.data.materials.append(mat)

import bpy

# Delete all objects in the scene
bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.object.delete(use_global=False)

# Create sphere
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=1, location=(0, 0, 0))
sphere = bpy.context.active_object

# Add material
mat = bpy.data.materials.new(name="SphereMaterial")
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes["Principled BSDF"]
bsdf.inputs[0].default_value = (0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1)  # Green color
sphere.data.materials.append(mat)

import bpy

# Delete all objects in the scene
bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.object.delete(use_global=False)

bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=1, depth=2, location=(0, 0, 0))

import bpy

# Delete all objects in the scene
bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.object.delete(use_global=False)

bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_torus_add(major_radius=1, minor_radius=0.3, location=(0, 0, 0))

import bpy

# Delete all objects in the scene
bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.object.delete(use_global=False)

# Create plane
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=4, location=(0, 0, 0))
plane = bpy.context.active_object

# Add material
mat = bpy.data.materials.new(name="PlaneMaterial")
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes["Principled BSDF"]
bsdf.inputs[0].default_value = (0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1)  # Gray color
plane.data.materials.append(mat)

import bpy

# Delete all objects in the scene
bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.object.delete(use_global=False)

# Create cone
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cone_add(radius1=1, depth=2, location=(0, 0, 0))
cone = bpy.context.active_object

# Add material
mat = bpy.data.materials.new(name="ConeMaterial")
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes["Principled BSDF"]
bsdf.inputs[0].default_value = (0.9, 0.4, 0.1, 1)  # Orange-red color
cone.data.materials.append(mat)

import bpy

# Add point light
light_data = bpy.data.lights.new(name="PointLight", type='POINT')
light_data.energy = 1000
light_object = bpy.data.objects.new(name="PointLight", object_data=light_data)
bpy.context.collection.objects.link(light_object)
light_object.location = (2, 2, 5)

# Add sun light
sun_data = bpy.data.lights.new(name="SunLight", type='SUN')
sun_data.energy = 5
sun_object = bpy.data.objects.new(name="SunLight", object_data=sun_data)
bpy.context.collection.objects.link(sun_object)
sun_object.location = (5, 5, 10)
sun_object.rotation_euler = (0.5, 0, 0.5)

# Add ambient light
world = bpy.context.scene.world
if not world:
    world = bpy.data.worlds.new("World")
    bpy.context.scene.world = world
world.use_nodes = True
bg_node = world.node_tree.nodes.get("Background")
if bg_node:
    bg_node.inputs[0].default_value = (0.1, 0.1, 0.15, 1)

import bpy

# Create camera
camera_data = bpy.data.cameras.new(name="Camera")
camera_object = bpy.data.objects.new(name="Camera", object_data=camera_data)
bpy.context.collection.objects.link(camera_object)

# Set camera position and direction
camera_object.location = (5, -5, 3)
camera_object.rotation_euler = (1.2, 0, 0.8)

# Set as active camera
bpy.context.scene.camera = camera_object

# Set camera parameters
camera_data.lens = 35
camera_data.sensor_fit = 'HORIZONTAL'
camera_data.sensor_width = 36
camera_data.sensor_height = 24

import bpy

# Set rendering engine
bpy.context.scene.render.engine = 'CYCLES'

# Set rendering resolution
bpy.context.scene.render.resolution_x = 1920
bpy.context.scene.render.resolution_y = 1080
bpy.context.scene.render.resolution_percentage = 100

# Set sample count
bpy.context.scene.cycles.samples = 128

# Set denoising
bpy.context.scene.cycles.use_denoising = True

# Set output path
bpy.context.scene.render.filepath = "/tmp/render.png"
bpy.context.scene.render.image_settings.file_format = 'PNG'

# Set transparent background
bpy.context.scene.render.film_transparent = True

import bpy

# Create material
mat = bpy.data.materials.new(name="CustomMaterial")
mat.use_nodes = True
nodes = mat.node_tree.nodes
links = mat.node_tree.links

# Get base nodes
bsdf = nodes.get("Principled BSDF")
output = nodes.get("Material Output")

# Create texture node
tex_node = nodes.new(type='ShaderNodeTexImage')
tex_node.location = (-300, 0)

# Create noise texture
noise_node = nodes.new(type='ShaderNodeTexNoise')
noise_node.location = (-500, 0)
noise_node.inputs["Scale"].default_value = 5.0

# Connect nodes
links.new(noise_node.outputs["Color"], tex_node.inputs["Vector"])
links.new(tex_node.outputs["Color"], bsdf.inputs["Base Color"])

# Assign material to object
obj = bpy.context.active_object
if obj:
    if obj.data.materials:
        obj.data.materials[0] = mat
    else:
        obj.data.materials.append(mat)

import bpy

# Select active object
obj = bpy.context.active_object
if not obj:
    print("Please select an object first")
    exit()

# Set position at frame 1
bpy.context.scene.frame_set(1)
obj.location = (0, 0, 0)
obj.keyframe_insert(data_path="location")

# Move to new position at frame 50
bpy.context.scene.frame_set(50)
obj.location = (5, 0, 0)
obj.keyframe_insert(data_path="location")

# Move to another position at frame 100
bpy.context.scene.frame_set(100)
obj.location = (10, 5, 2)
obj.keyframe_insert(data_path="location")

# Add rotation animation
bpy.context.scene.frame_set(1)
obj.rotation_euler = (0, 0, 0)
obj.keyframe_insert(data_path="rotation_euler")

bpy.context.scene.frame_set(100)
obj.rotation_euler = (0, 0, 6.28)  # 360 degree rotation
obj.keyframe_insert(data_path="rotation_euler")

print("Animation keyframes created")

import bpy

# Select active object
obj = bpy.context.active_object
if not obj:
    print("Please select an object first")
    exit()

# Add particle system
particle_system = obj.modifiers.new(name="ParticleSystem", type='PARTICLE_SYSTEM')
psys = obj.particle_systems.active

# Set particle system properties
psys.settings.count = 1000  # Particle count
psys.settings.frame_start = 1  # Start frame
psys.settings.frame_end = 100  # End frame
psys.settings.lifetime = 50  # Particle lifetime
psys.settings.emit_from = 'VOLUME'  # Emit from volume
psys.settings.use_emit_random = True  # Random emission

# Set particle physics
psys.settings.physics_type = 'NEWTON'
psys.settings.normal_factor = 1.0
psys.settings.tangent_factor = 0.5
psys.settings.factor_random = 0.5

# Set particle size
psys.settings.particle_size = 0.1
psys.settings.size_random = 0.5

print("Particle system created")

import bpy

# Select active object
obj = bpy.context.active_object
if not obj:
    print("Please select an object first")
    exit()

# Create armature
armature_data = bpy.data.armatures.new(name="Armature")
armature_obj = bpy.data.objects.new(name="Armature", object_data=armature_data)
bpy.context.collection.objects.link(armature_obj)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = armature_obj
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')

# Add bone
bone = armature_data.edit_bones.new("Bone")
bone.head = (0, 0, 0)
bone.tail = (0, 0, 2)

# Switch back to object mode
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

# Add armature modifier to object
mod = obj.modifiers.new(name="Armature", type='ARMATURE')
mod.object = armature_obj

# Set parent object
obj.parent = armature_obj

print("Rigging created")
